name: Strawberry Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Stir together dry ingredients (flour and baking powder) plus 1/4 tsp salt in a bowl. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat butter and shortening for 30 seconds. Add sugar and beat until fluffy. Beat in egg, milk, and vanilla until well combined.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, beating until just combined.
5. Place the dough on an ungreased pizza pan or baking sheet. Press it into a round shape about 1/4 inch thick (thicker if preferred).
6. Bake for 10-15 minutes at 375°F, or until golden brown.
7. Topping: Spread softened cream cheese evenly over the baked crust. Arrange strawberry slices on top of the cream cheese. Drizzle with strawberry glaze.
8. Chill in the refrigerator for about an hour before serving.
